scripts.test: turbo run test && pnpm run test:py
scripts.test:py: python3 -m compileall -q apps/api/src apps/worker/src apps/mcp/src && echo '✓ Python compile check passed'
scripts.test:py:full: cd apps/api && PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/ -x -q
scripts.check:contracts: pnpm exec tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/domain-models/tsconfig.json --noEmit
